final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial food photography shot of a Japanese tonkotsu ramen bowl with chopsticks lifting noodles.

Style/medium: food editorial photography, Japanese culinary magazine aesthetic, photorealistic
Composition: tight close-up macro shot, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens equivalent, chopsticks entering frame from upper right
Subject: tonkotsu ramen with rich milky pork bone broth, visible chashu slices, soft-boiled ajitsuke tamago with runny yolk, nori sheets, chopped scallions, steam rising
Scene/backdrop: dark wooden table surface, heavily blurred restaurant interior background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused side lighting from upper left, warm highlights on broth surface, appetizing and intimate
Color palette: creamy off-white broth as base, rich brown chashu, golden yolk, dark green nori, bright green scallions as accents
Materials/textures: glossy broth sheen, tender meat fibers, silky noodle strands, steam wisps
Avoid: plastic-looking food, oversaturated colors, watermarks, text overlays, generic stock photo aesthetic
